data.description:
Register `session_log` as a first-class ticket type and enforce its write-path
rules: it can be created and edited/commented, but it is gate-exempt, cannot be
claimed or transitioned, and rejects blocking links while allowing non-blocking
ones.

## Why

This is the foundation the rest of the epic builds on. The type must exist and
behave correctly on the write path before performance isolation, the recent-logs
command, Jira exclusion, or capture tooling can be layered on.

## What

- Add `session_log` to the ticket-type enum in
  `src/rebar/schemas/common.schema.json` and to `_TYPES` in
  `src/rebar/_commands/composer.py` (and its error message).
- Give it a hierarchy placement in `src/rebar/graph/_hierarchy.py` that keeps it
  out of blocking-link promotion (leaf / non-participating).
- Refuse `claim` and `transition` on a `session_log` with a clear message
  (lifecycle-exempt); keep `show` / `comment` / `edit` working as normal.
- In the link path, refuse `blocks` / `depends_on` for a `session_log` endpoint
  while allowing `relates_to` / `discovered_from`.
- Make `clarity_check` / `check_ac` / `quality_check` treat `session_log` as
  exempt (pass/skip) in `src/rebar/_engine_support/gates.py`.

## Scope

Write-path + type registration only. Read-path performance isolation, the recent
command, Jira exclusion, capture tooling, and docs are separate stories.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `rebar create session_log "..."` succeeds across schema + `_TYPES`.
- [ ] `claim` and `transition` on a `session_log` are refused with a clear error.
- [ ] `blocks` / `depends_on` to/from a `session_log` are refused; `relates_to` /
      `discovered_from` succeed.
- [ ] `clarity_check` / `check_ac` / `quality_check` return exempt/pass for a
      `session_log` regardless of body shape.
- [ ] `show`, `comment`, and `edit` operate normally on a `session_log`.
- [ ] Unit tests cover create, the refusals, the link rules, and gate exemption.
data.title: Register session_log type + write-path rules (gate/lifecycle exempt, non-blocking links)
